Jetzt schon auf die Sommerferien freuen!
🍉👓🧴🍦☀️🏝️

Mit ClarAct geht das 🌈☺️☺️

🐝Komm mit uns auf die Bühne und spiele deine Traumrolle!-🎭🧚🏻‍♀️🐼👮👑🏴‍☠️

Du hast Lust auf der Bühne zu stehen und deine eigene Geschichte zu schreiben und zu spielen? 

Dann bist du in unserem Schauspielworkshop in den Hamburger Sommerferien 2026 genau richtig ☺️🥳

Am Ende werden wir unser eigenes Stück mit Kostüm und allem Drum und Dran vor deinen Gästen auf unserer coolen Bühne präsentieren! 🎬🎭🕴️

Sei dabei und melde dich jetzt an und profitiere von unserem early bird Rabatt!🐥

📍 Ort: Hamburg Hafencity
📅 Termin: 27. und 28. Juli 2026 
  jeweils 10-13 Uhr 
🐥Jetzt mit Rabatt: 129,00€ statt 149,00€

👉 Mehr Infos & Anmeldung: Link in der Bio
  www.claract.de

🚨 Die Plätze sind begrenzt – melde dich am besten direkt an!
Geeignet für Kinder von 5-12 Jahren

Bei Fragen melde dich jederzeit bei mir!😊
Ich freue mich auf dich 🥳

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL — FREE ZONE**

We are looking for a **Persian-speaking woman** for a small voice-over role in FREE ZONE — a feature documentary about Exarcheia in Athens.

The role is **three sentences in Persian.** Recording can be done remotely on an iPhone — no studio, no professional equipment needed.

FREE ZONE is a DFFB Abschlussfilm, RBB Leuchtstoff funded, and dok.münchen pitch winner, heading for festival premieres!

If you're interested or know someone who might be — please message us or share. Every recommendation helps.

📩 [jasmine.alakari@gmail.com](mailto:jasmine.alakari@gmail.com)

items.text:
CASTING CALL
SPIN CYCLE

Student Short Film | Aurora Cinematic Arts Department

Non-Union | Unpaid | Meals Provided

Casting Italian, Italian-American actors for Spin Cycle, a dark crime-horror short film produced through the Aurora Cinematic Arts Department.

This project is intended for actors looking to gain on-set experience, build their reel, and collaborate with other filmmakers.

“In a neighborhood ruled by organized crime, a simple cleanup job leads two wiseguys down a path of secrets, paranoia, and something lurking in their territory.”

SHOOTING LATE AUGUST EARLY SEPTEMBER, DATES TBD

SEEKING:

- JOSEPH CARUSO

Male | Italian / Italian-American | 25-35

A capable mob hitman with sharp instincts and a quiet intensity. Joseph is observant, cautious, and far more intelligent than his peers give him credit for.

Lead Role

- CHRIS

Male | Italian / Italian-American | 22-30

Joseph's longtime friend and partner. Quick-witted, sarcastic, and constantly trying to lighten the mood. Chris often serves as comic relief but proves loyal when things become dangerous. A natural talker with strong comedic timing.

Supporting Role

- FRANK PALMIERI

Male | Italian / Italian-American | 55-70

An aging but powerful mafia boss. Frank is intimidating, sharp-tongued, and commands attention the moment he enters a room. He expects competence and has little patience for excuses.

Supporting Role

- MR. TEDESCO

Male | Italian / Italian-American | 50-65

A burly neighborhood figure with a rough exterior and suspicious nature. Tedesco carries himself like someone who has survived a lifetime of street politics. Appears in several key scenes.

Supporting Role

- YOUNG MAN

Male | Italian / Italian-American Preferred | 18-25

A curious and seemingly harmless young man. Charming but slightly suspicious. Limited screen time.

Day Player

- BUTCHER 1

Male | Any Ethnicity | 30-55

A nervous worker involved in a gruesome operation. Physical role with minimal dialogue.

Featured Supporting

- BUTCHER 2

Male | Any Ethnicity | 30-55

A silent butcher working behind the scenes of the operation. Intimidating physical presence preferred.

Featured Supporting

- CULT MEMBERS

Male or Female | Any Ethnicity | 18-60

Members of a bizarre underground cult. Physical performers comfortable with stunt-style movement and horror elements are encouraged to submit.

Background / Featured Background

TO SUBMIT

Please send:

• Headshot

• Resume (if available)

• Demo Reel (preferred)

• If you do not have a reel, a short monologue is acceptable

Contact

kleverfilms.st@gmail.com

Please include the role(s) you are interested in and any relevant acting experience.

Non-Union • Unpaid • Aurora Cinematic Arts Department Student Production

items.text:
Creative Videographer / Content Creator
Full-time • Los Angeles, CA

We are looking for a creative videographer and content creator to join our growing team working on entertainment, social media, original shows, and digital media projects.

This position is for someone who genuinely loves creating content, follows emerging trends, and is constantly improving their craft.

We are not looking for someone who simply knows how to operate a camera.

We are looking for someone who understands how modern audiences consume content, what works today, and what will work tomorrow.

We need someone who can think creatively, not just shoot.

Language Requirements

Russian is strongly preferred.

Many internal discussions and creative processes take place in Russian, so candidates should be comfortable communicating fluently in Russian.

At the same time, strong English communication skills are required, as our projects operate in the United States.

Responsibilities

* Filming interviews, podcasts, shows, and social media content.

* Creating content for TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and other digital platforms.

* Participating in the development of new content formats and creative concepts.

* Researching and bringing new trends, references, and visual ideas to the team.

* Assisting with production preparation and content planning.

* Participating in content production and execution.

* Working with cameras, lighting, composition, and visual storytelling.

* Contributing ideas and helping develop creative solutions.

Who We’re Looking For

* Someone with strong visual taste and attention to detail.

* Someone who actively follows trends in social media, YouTube, TikTok, and digital media.

* Someone who is passionate about content creation and wants to continue growing professionally.

* Someone who works well as part of a team.

* A reliable and responsible professional.

* Someone who can receive feedback and use it as a tool for growth.

For us, great content is about more than beautiful visuals.

Understanding the objective matters just as much.

We are looking for someone who can first understand the goal, audience, and desired outcome of a project — and then find the most effective creative solution.

We highly value people who can analyze their own work, learn from mistakes, and continuously improve.

You do not need to know everything.

But you should be willing to learn, adapt, and constantly raise your own standards.

Our Philosophy

We have our own studio and access to professional production resources.

However, we believe that great content is created by ideas, not budgets.

Audiences do not come for expensive cameras or large productions.

They come for emotion, storytelling, and memorable experiences.

That is why we are looking for someone who can create content that looks bigger than its budget, understands the power of visual storytelling, and can find creative solutions where others see limitations.

We can provide the space, equipment, and opportunities.

We are looking for someone who can bring creativity, initiative, strong instincts, and a desire to create outstanding content.

What We Offer

* A starting salary.

* The opportunity to work on real entertainment, media, and digital content projects.

* The chance to contribute to original shows, interviews, social media campaigns, and new content formats.

* A creative environment where strong ideas and initiative are valued.

* Long-term opportunities for people who consistently demonstrate results, responsibility, and a desire to grow.

* Potential future participation in the company’s success through equity, options, or other long-term incentive programs for key contributors.

To Apply

Please send:

* Your resume

* Portfolio or showreel

* Links to your social media profiles (if applicable)

Please send your application to:

controlrunwin@gmail.com

We are looking for someone for the long term. Finding the right person is more important to us than filling the position quickly.

items.text: Calling actors: Mary is casting. This women-led surreal psychological short follows a young woman as an interview meant to reclaim her story begins to spiral into something invasive and unsettling. We’re looking for thoughtful, collaborative performers excited by bold independent work. Send your headshot, resume/reel, and availability to cassiebeddor@gmail.com.

attachments.ocrText: May be a black-and-white image of text that says 'CASTING!!! We're re casting Mary, a surreal psychological short film about image, control, and what happens when the act of being seen becomes something invasive. This is α women-written, women-directed, women- produced independent short, and we're looking for grounded, expressive actors excited to help bring this unsettling world to life. Please email cassiebeddor@gmail.com with your headshot, resume/reel, and availability and the role you are applying for in the subject line'

May be an image of text that says 'AVAILABLE ROLES: : PRINCIPAL CAST AND MARY PLAYING AGE: LATE 20S- EARLY 30S ROLE SIZE: LEAD A SOCIAL MEDIA FIGURE WRITER TRYING to REGAIN CONTROL OF HER PUBLIC IMAGE AFTER A PUBLIC DIVORCE AND CHEATING SCANDAL. MARY BEGINS COMPOSED AND GUARDED, BUT BECOMES INCREASINGLY UNSETTLED AS INTERVIEW TURNS INVASIVE AND SURREAL. ALLISON PLAYING AGE: MID 40S ROLE SIZE: SUPPORTING AN EXPERIENCED INTERVIEWER/JOURNALIST WHO ARRIVES AT MARY'S HOME WITH WARMTH, CONFIDENCE, AND A CLEAR AGENDA. CHARMING ON THE SURFACE, BUT INCREASINGLY RUTHLESS IN PURSUIT OF A MORE SENSATIONAL STORY.'

May be an image of text that says 'SMALL ROLES/DAYPLAYERS MAKEUP ARTIST PLAYING AGE:30-50 ROLE SIZE: SMALL SUPPORTING PART OF THE INTERVIEW CREW. ADJUSTS MARY'S APPEARANCE FOR THE CAMERA. *Please could you share with anyone you might know with weird football superstitions?!*

We're looking for people with Football based superstitions as new data shows 44% of UK fans engage in some form of football superstition and 3.7 million wear lucky pants while watching England! Do you know someone who has a pre-football ritual in hopes of their team scoring? Or someone who has to wear a certain pair of socks to a game? 

Ideally they’ll be happy being pictured and commenting on their unusual superstition!

Message me here or jackmcardle@hatch.group

topComments.text: My husband tells me not to look at the score when his team are playing 🤣

items.text:
THE AGON | One Night. Seven Plays. One Winner.

We invite you to The Agon - a new writing competition from The Base - on 3rd July at the beautiful Stone Nest in the heart of the West End. Taking inspiration from the Ancient Greek festivals, The Base put the call out to fearless new writers to express themselves. Nothing is off limits.
Extracts from the finalists will be performed and YOU - the audience - will vote on the winner.
The Base is bringing back a competitive, democratic, and genuinely dangerous spirit to new writing. The Base’s mission is to revive the true meaning of the great masterworks and inject excellence, depth, and vitality into new writing. Through the dramatic arts, we are inspiring audiences to engage with the Western canon on a deeper level and freeing playwrights to be bold, provocative, and courageous.

⸻

INDIVIDUAL PLAYS:

LUCIFER REX:
Set in a pre-biblical desert Lucifer, a part of God’s conscience, ventures into the world to liberate humanity from the cosmic burden of religion.

SIRENS:
A furious encounter between twenty year old Conor and middle-aged Francesca takes a dark turn.

GLOBULAR BRITAIN:
Henry is an employee at a company called Globular Britain. But his world is turned upside down when his line manager tells him that his office has been given to a new foreign employee.

THE SHORT GIANT BOOK:
A chance meeting with an amiable seven-metre-tall man at an office Christmas party sends Kate on an epic quest. But will she live to tell the tale?

MISS ENGLAND:
A working-class English family is torn apart when it is revealed what their daughter has been doing for money.

BASILISK:
Co-workers trade insults, bicker and gossip about who’s has and hasn’t been invited to the latest parties. All while casually engaged in work that has enormous, and possibly murderous consequences.

TYPE 3:
John is just an ordinary guy. So when he is visited in the middle of the night by a man dressed as Hitler, is it a fever-dream or an encounter with an entity not of this world

📍 Stone Nest, West End
🎟️ £20 Tickets

One night. Seven plays. One winner.

Tickets available here: https://tickets.stonenest.org/events/stonenest/2248542?trackingConsent=1

For access, further details, or any questions feel free to message us directly @thebasecreates

items.text:
🤔 "Within my lifelong friendship group I'm affectionately known as Miss Jones. Why? Nobody knows. Somewhere between the passing years, many, many bottles of wine, and collective memory failure, the origin story has been lost. At this point though, the unwavering commitment from all involved only enhances the mystery.“

For our individual spotlight today, we proudly introduce the remarkable Zoe, who will be taking to the stage in the legendary role of Van Helsing this October!

🩸 Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really by Kate Hamill
📅 29–31 October 2026
📍 St Aidan's Hall, Rochdale 
🎟️ Tickets available soon 

#DarkTheatreRochdale #Dracula #FeministTheatre #UKAmateurPremiere #MeetTheCast

sharedPost.text:
🤔 "Within my lifelong friendship group I'm affectionately known as Miss Jones. Why? Nobody knows. Somewhere between the passing years, many, many bottles of wine, and collective memory failure, the origin story has been lost. At this point though, the unwavering commitment from all involved only enhances the mystery.“

For our individual spotlight today, we proudly introduce the remarkable Zoe, who will be taking to the stage in the legendary role of Van Helsing this October!

🎭 About Zoe
Zoe's acting journey began with just a single drama class in high school before it was removed from the curriculum. Years later, after facing a serious illness, she decided that making a full recovery was non-negotiable—and that she would finally pursue the passions she had been too afraid to try.
She went on to complete a BTEC in Performing Arts (Acting), earning a top-tier Distinction. The course also ignited a passion for writing, leading Zoe to complete an MA in Writing for Script and Screen, graduating with yet another Distinction!

🦇 On Playing Van Helsing
"I never lost my longing for acting and attended night classes. I was absolutely thrilled to be offered the part of Van Helsing in Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really. As it's my first formal role, I am terrified but also super excited to be part of such an exciting production and talented cast, and I really hope to do this wonderful character justice!"

🤪 Definitely Not Fiction
As absurd as it sounds, qualified 19th-century American doctors really did take part in community vampire hunts, exhuming bodies in attempts to stop the undead. 
Bram Stoker collected newspaper reports of these cases and used them as inspiration for Dracula. 
Kate Hamill's frontier-doctor Van Helsing isn't just a comic invention—it's surprisingly close to history.

🩸 Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really by Kate Hamill
📅 29–31 October 2026
📍 St Aidan's Hall, Rochdale 
🎟️ Tickets available soon 

#DarkTheatreRochdale #Dracula #FeministTheatre #UKAmateurPremiere #MeetTheCast

items.text:
CASTING CALL – LEAD ROLE (ITALIAN SPEAKER)
A STRANGE DAY (SHORT FILM)

We are currently casting the lead role for A Strange Day, an independent short film developed between Germany and Italy and intended for international film festivals.

Looking for a young Italian football player—or someone who could convincingly be one—for the lead role 

This project is fully self funded by the crew members so unfortunately this is an UNPAID role

ROLE: GUIDO CAPPELLI 

Male | Playing Age 16–18

Guido is a 17-year-old Italian football player participating in an international youth tournament in Germany.

While his teammates focus on winning, Guido gradually becomes fascinated by the mysterious forests surrounding the sports complex. What begins as curiosity slowly turns into a journey through adolescence, imagination, isolation and self-discovery.

We are looking for someone with a natural screen presence and emotional authenticity rather than extensive acting experience.

REQUIREMENTS

✓ Fluent Italian speaker (required)

✓ Playing age 16–18

✓ Athletic build

✓ Football experience is welcome but not essential

✓ Strong expressive presence on camera

✓ Based in Berlin, or in nearest areas of Germany

ABOUT THE FILM

A Strange Day is a coming-of-age mystery inspired by youth football culture, personal memories, and the visual tradition of Italian Giallo cinema.

The film explores a universal feeling many people experienced growing up: the moment when you begin to drift away from the group around you and start searching for your own place in the world.

SHOOTING

Germany, Berlin

August 2026

TO APPLY

Please send:

• Headshot

• Recent photos

• Age and city where you based now

• Acting experience (if any)

• Football experience (if any)

Subject:

GUIDO CASTING – Your Name

Contact:

Hannahrynevich@gmail.com

📢 WANT TO FEATURE YOUR CASTING CALL ON OUR MAIN PAGE? 🎬

Did you know you can get your project featured directly by Casting Calls UK?

While our Facebook Group is a fantastic place for the community to post breakdowns, we love giving an extra push for your projects right here on our main Profile Page for that bonus reach and visibility.

If you want us to feature your casting call on our main page, we can post it for you! Just send us an email with all the relevant information.

✉️ What to include in your email:
To help us get your post up quickly, please make sure to include:

The Poster / Artwork
Project Location (audition & shoot locations)
Fee / Compensation Details
Full Casting Brief (character breakdowns and requirements)

Application Instructions (how talent should apply)

📩 Send your details to: info@castingcalls.uk
👉 Subject Line: Main Page Casting Request - [Your Project Name]

Looking for roles instead? Skip the scroll and get your portfolio directly in front of industry members by setting up your official profile today!

👉 https://appcastingcalls.uk/

#CastingCallsUK #CCUK #UKCasting #UKActors #CastingDirector #FilmmakersUK

sharedPost.text:
Why I Believe Sri Lanka Needs Clown Training?
.
Professional Intensive in Clowning & Physical Theatre 2026 🎭
Join a 1-week immersive training with Ania Upstill (USA) & Clown Compass 🇱🇰

📅 July 6th – 12th, 2026
 ⏰ 9.00 AM – 4.00 PM
 📍 Kolamba Kamatha, BMICH, Colombo, Sri Lanka. 

This one-week, certificate-based practical training is designed for clowns, actors, performers, theatre-makers, dancers, multidisciplinary artists, educators, and curious minds interested in developing embodied performance practices. Whether you are an emerging or professional artist, you are welcome to apply. This intensive is ideal for anyone curious about play, movement, and physical performance, including travellers interested in immersive artistic experiences.

What you’ll experience:
 • Daily training in clowning & physical theatre
 • Introduction to Jacques Lecoq-inspired clown practice
 • Mask work, improvisation & character development
 • Sri Lankan low-country dance (Pahatharata) & rhythm work
 • Yoga, body conditioning & breath work
 • Ensemble creation & collaborative performance making
 • Cultural exchange with local & international artists

🌍 Hosted in the vibrant BMICH Kolamba Kamatha, this program offers a unique space for intercultural exchange, creativity, and deep artistic exploration.
🌐 Medium - English & Sinhala

 Programe Fee and Structure 
 • International (Western Countries):
 Early Bird: USD 749 | Regular: USD 849
 • South Asian & Asian Participants:
 Early Bird: USD 449 | Regular: USD 549
 • Sri Lankan Participants:
 Early Bird: LKR 45,000 | Regular: LKR 55,000
Reserve your spot: Pay 30% of the fee (conditions apply) 
👥 Limited spots available for a focused and intimate learning experience. 
🎉 Stay tuned for more details!
📩 For more details, feel free to contact 
info.clowncompass@gmail.com or 
clowncompass@gmail.com 

#ClownCompass #SriLankaEvents #ArtForChange #ClownLife #MaskMagic

items.text:
Marc Graue is one of the most respected names in the voice over industry, combining decades of professional experience as a voice actor, coach, director, and legendary demo producer. Having worked with thousands of voice actors—from beginners to established professionals—Marc has helped shape successful careers across animation, video games, commercials, promos, audiobooks, and narration.
As the founder of Marc Graue Voice Over Studios, Marc provides world-class voice over coaching, personalized career guidance, professional demo production, audition training, and performance direction. His coaching focuses on helping talent discover their authentic voice, sharpen their acting skills, master today's competitive marketplace, and develop the confidence needed to book more work.
What You'll Get
When you work with Marc Graue, you receive far more than coaching—you gain a trusted mentor with decades of real-world industry experience. You'll learn how to create compelling performances, develop memorable characters, improve audition skills, understand industry expectations, and position yourself for long-term success. Whether you're pursuing commercials, animation, video games, audiobooks, or narration, Marc provides honest feedback, practical strategies, and personalized guidance designed to help you stand out.
Why Marc Graue
Marc's reputation has been built on results. His students and clients have gone on to book major projects, secure top agency representation, and build thriving voice over careers. Through expert coaching, legendary demo production, and an unwavering commitment to excellence, Marc helps voice actors transform talent into opportunity and potential into success.

items.text:
TRUDNE SPRAWY, WROCŁAW. 

**Poszukuję epizodystów**:

**BOŻENA (46-52 lata) - 6.07.2026**

**Wygląd i szczegóły: **Włosy w kolorze ciemnym lub rudym.** **Ubiera się i czesze w taki sposób, że wygląda młodziej – kwieciste sukienki, biżuteria boho, burza loków. Wyluzowana, uśmiechnięta.

Pracuje w salonie fryzjerskim. Energiczna, dowcipna, pełna wigoru, zawsze chętna do pomocy i rozmowy. Nie przejmuje się konwenansami i opinią innych ludzi. 

**JERZY (44-48 lat) – 6.07.2026**

Wygląd i szczegóły: Bardzo przystojny i z charyzmą, ale nieco zniszczony życiem. Były alkoholik.

**MACIEJ (27-31 lat) - 8 i 9.07.2026**

Wygląd: Przystojny, dobrze zbudowany

Szczegóły: Zaangażowany w sprawy rodzinne, pomocny i bystry

**BASIA (26-30 lat) – 9.07.2026**

Wygląd: Drobna, ładna

Szczegóły: Skromna, pomocna, ma dobre relacje z teściami, ale nie narzuca się

**JÓZEF (60-75 lat) – 8.07, 10.07.2026**

Wygląd: Zadbany starszy pan, elegancki w starym stylu.

Szczegóły: kulturalny, szarmancki, typ starodawnego dżentelmena.

**GRZEGORZ (38-42 lata) – 8.07, 10.07.2026**

Wygląd: Z lekką nadwagą, ale ubrany nowocześnie.

Szczegóły: Czarny charakter. Typ cwaniaka i oszusta, niekulturalny.

**LEKARZ GERIATRA (ok. 45-55 lat) - 9.07.2026**

Szczegóły: Cierpliwy, stonowany.

**RATOWNICY MEDYCZNI (30-50 lat) - 9.07.2026**

Szczegóły: Dwóch pomocnych, ale stanowczych mężczyzn.

**Wynagrodzenie płatne gotówką na planie.**

Proszę o zgłoszenia poprzez messenger lub na numer telefonu: **798 970 883**. Dziękuję!

items.text:
Cześć Warszawo🎬
Zapraszam  na casting do Sieci znanych restauracji. Przy tym projekcie nie ma recallu. 

 

Daty:

04.07 - przymiarki

07.07 - dzień zdjęciowy

Stawki:

 

Role główne:

1200 brutto  - dzień zdjęciowy

2400 brutto - prawa

 

Role epizodyczne:

1200 brutto  - dzień zdjęciowy

1900 brutto - prawa

 

Postaci:

 

Role główne: 

1. Nurek - mężczyzna w wieku 30-45, wysportowany, szczupły 

2. Kursantka - kobieta w wieku 20-30 lat

3. Rycerz - mężczyzna w wieku 25-35 lat, z dłuższymi włosami, brodą/zarostem, szczupły 

 

Role epizodyczne:

4. Pracownica - kobieta w wieku 20-25 lat, charakterystyczna (piegi, kręcone włosy itp.)

5. Instruktor - mężczyzna w wieku 50-60 lat, włosy siwiejące 

6. Kierowca Rycerz - 25-35 lat, charakterny, z brodą, szczupły, dłuższe włosy 

7. Kumple - 2 mężczyzn w wieku 18-25, typ gen z, fajny ziomek

8. Kobieta beauty - kobieta w wieku 25-35 lat z długimi włosami i zadbanymi dłońmi

9. Mężczyzna przy stoliku - mężczyzna w wieku 25-35 lat, bez zarostu 

 

Do nagrania dla każdego:

Wizytówka + scenka 

Proszę wypełnić kartę castingową 

 

Proszę o wysyłanie zgłoszeń na na maila:

plan@filmakcja.pl

W tytule rolę do której Państwo się zgłaszacie.

W mailu proszę o imię, nazwisko, wiek, tel oraz wyraźne zdjęcia twarzy i sylwetki oraz wymagana wizytówka.

Wyślę zainteresowanym karte castingową,  scenkę do nagrania oraz link do zgłoszenia.

Pełne zgłoszenia już ze scenka przyjmujemy do niedzieli do 21:00.

Marta Filmakcja 🎬🎞️🫶

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL 🎬
We are currently seeking actors for an upcoming film project.

Role Rate: $1,000

Script Length: Approximately 40 pages

We are specifically looking for:

• Male actor, age 25–40, height 6'0"–6'5"

• African American actors, ages 25–50

Please submit:

• IMDB link (if available)

• Acting reel

• Headshot

• Resume (optional)

Serious inquiries only.

📩 Send submissions to: sirrjonesproductions@gmail.com

Looking to cast quickly and move into production.

topComments.text:
-Title?
-Union/Non Union?
-Rate...per day or flat?
-Shoot Duration?
-Shoot Date?
-Location?
-Local/Nationwide Talent?
-Submission Deadline?
-Self-Tape/In-Person auditions? 
Thanks

items.title: 🎬 CASTING CALL 🎬

items.text:
Ashley BeLoat, Tomorrow 🗣️
Actress and model based in LA. Lead or main support in 31 vertical dramas, across most platforms: ReelShort, Dramabox, Goodshort, Netshort, Candy Jar.

items.text:
Hello, I am looking to get a meeting with a producer or agent to talk about my cartoon. I am in Long Beach, CA. It is called Captain Bong Water. It's about super hero alien bongs trying to save mother nature in hilarious stoned ways, I have a lot of characters created already and about 16 pages of backstory/script. Also have some shirts made for it as well. The cartoon actually got me put on a cannabis reality tv show for 420. I have been working on the cartoon for 2 years now. I have a shirt design for each character so far and it has their names on them.
Here is some of the story to give you an idea of the show. 

The alien bongs come from a planet called Herbzellia420. It is ruled by The Zen Council ( the heroes of the story) and on their home planet they live in a giant cannabis bud called The Nugg Fortress of Good Vibes. The main villain is The Evil Broken Dr. Bong who enslaved the planet of Pillseedia (the Zen Council had imprisoned him there for trying to steal all the cannabis for himself and enslave everybody and get them zombied out on pills) In the beginning of the story Dr. Bong sends the planet of pillseedia into their home planet Herbzellia420 and destroys them both in a giant explosion , sending parts of the planets carrying the people from them all across the universe with a great deal of them going towards earth. This happens right before the dinosaurs on earth so you see them throughout time in cave paintings and artwork throughout time.

https://www.instagram.com/captainbongwaterofficial?igsh=MzRlODBiNWFlZA==

items.text: MONDAY - NEW ROUTINE - £3! 🤯

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody

items.text:
CASTING CALL - PAID
*(Music Video: “We Know About You”)*

**Role: 6‑YEAR‑OLD MATT**

**Playing Age:** 5–8 **Gender:** Male **Ethnicity:** Open **Location:** North West preferred (Chorley‑based shoot) **Legal Requirement:** **A parent or legal guardian must be present at all times during filming.**

**Overview**

We are casting a **natural, expressive young boy** to portray the 6‑year‑old version of the protagonist. This role is central to the emotional heart of the music video, appearing in **flashbacks, dream sequences, and symbolic scenes** that explore the character’s early memories of his mother.

The performance is **non‑verbal**, relying on facial expression, innocence, curiosity, and physical play.

**Key Scenes**
* **Hide‑and‑seek in the woods**: Running, laughing, hiding behind trees as Mum searches playfully.
* **Bedroom moment**: Reaching out to Mum in a dreamlike scene, symbolic and gentle.
* **Emotional beats**: Showing innocence, longing, and confusion as memories shift.

All scenes are **child‑safe**, emotionally guided, and filmed with a parent present.

**Shoot Details**
* **Location:** Chorley
* **Dates:** half‑day during the last two weeks of August
* **Paid role: £50 plus expenses**
* **Parent/guardian must be present at all times**
* All scenes filmed with full safeguarding procedures

**How to Apply**

Please send email to [doublesixproductionsltd@gmail.com](mailto:doublesixproductionsltd@gmail.com) with the following details:
* Recent photo
* Short video clip (natural, playful, or expressive moment)
* Parent/guardian contact details
* Note confirming availability and location

topComments.text:
You talk a lot about safeguarding but haven't stated you will be applying for a performance licence for the child. This is the legal requirement - as well as having the chaperone (parent). 
Presumably you will be doing this?

* Note confirming availability and location

items.text:
🎭 Ever fancied giving acting or improvisation a go?

I'm launching a brand new Adult Improvisation Class in Huyton, starting Sunday 5th July, and whether you've never stepped on stage before or you've acted in the past and want to sharpen your skills, you'll be very welcome.

I've spent nearly 20 years performing in improvised murder mysteries, and as co-owner of Alara Entertainment, improvisation has become a huge part of what I do. Every show is different, and thinking on your feet is a skill that's useful both on and off the stage.

These sessions will be relaxed, supportive, and packed with fun games and exercises designed to build confidence, creativity, quick thinking, and performance skills. No scripts, no pressure, and absolutely no experience required. And best of all, it's completely free of charge!

📍 An Hour For Others, Huyton
🕖 7:00pm every Sunday
📅 Starting Sunday 5th July

If you've been looking for a new hobby, want to meet new people, or simply fancy trying something different, come along and give it a go.

Drop me a message if you'd like more information or to reserve your place!

items.text:
**Casting Call - Volunteer, Non-union, IMDB credit, Snippet**

I'm casting for a comedy short film- Vijay Finds His Dating Mojo. I plan to send this film to film festivals and use it as a proof of concept for a feature film. Audition submission deadline- 29th June.

**Synopsis-** An immigrant from India, Vijay, takes services from a manipulative dating coach, Jason. After several failures, Vijay decides to discard pickup lines and pretensions and be himself. He meets Sophia, and they hit it off. Will him being honest work out or backfire?

**Casting:**

Vijay's Date- 28-38, Any ethnicity, large-bodied/curvy, shoot on 11th July. 

Lady in Bar- 22-35, in good shape, any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th July. 2-3 lines 

People in Bar- Men and Women in their 20s and 30s. Need 5 women and 5 men. Any ethnicity. Shoot on either 11th or 12th July.

**Location:** Vancouver Downtown 

**Date:** 11th and 12th July, 2026

**Pay:** Volunteer, IMDB credit, Snippet

**To Apply:**
Please email **tomar.gautam2@yahoo.com** with:
• Resume
• Headshots
• Demo reel (if available)

Subject line: **“Character and your name”**

Thanks!

items.text:
**CASTING SURREY-BASED SOCCER FAMILIES FOR TSN SPORTSCENTRE SEGMENT**

Hi all, I'm a producer working on behalf of Paper Route Studios ([https://www.thisispaperroute.com/documentaries](https://www.thisispaperroute.com/documentaries)), led by award-winning Executive Producer Corey Russell (credits include ***All or Nothing: Toronto Maple Leafs***).

We're currently casting **Surrey-based **soccer-loving families for a TSN SportsCentre segment tied to the opening of Western Canada’s first Jumpstart Community Soccer Pitch in Surrey. The piece will celebrate the impact of grassroots sport and the opportunities it creates for local families. 

We're looking to hear from families with an interesting personal connection to playing soccer - whether it has brought your family together, created opportunities, helped someone through a difficult time, or simply become an important part of your lives. If you have a soccer story you'd love to share, we'd love to hear from you!  

If this sounds like your family, please get in touch!

WhatsApp/text Adam at (647)562-0767 or email at [casting@thisispaperroute.com](mailto:casting@thisispaperroute.com) if interested. Thanks!

Thank you,

Adam
items.title: Documentaries — Paper Route Studios

items.text:
# **CASTING** **CALL** — Girls' Night Out Short Film **SUPPORTING & BG**

A cinematic short film about five Black women navigating one Friday evening together in Vancouver, BC.
We are currently casting Supporting Roles and Background Performers. Seeking performers from all experience levels.

SUPPORTING ROLES 
GLADYS: 40s–60s, White Female, Office colleague
COLLEAGUE #1: Late 20s–30s, White Female, Office colleague
LISA: Late 20s–40s, Female, Open Ethnicity, Possibly Voice Over, One-liner
COLLEAGUE #2: Late 20s–40s, White Male, One-liner
COLLEAGUE #3: Late 20s–40s, White Male, One-liner
OLDER MAN: 60+, Male, Open Ethnicity, Apartment neighbour, One-liner

BACKGROUND PERFORMERS To authentically reflect the cultural richness & diversity of Vancouver, we especially encourage submissions from Indigenous, Black, Latino, East Asian, South Asian, Southeast Asian, Middle Eastern, Mixed-Race, and White performers. All ethnicities, backgrounds, body types, abilities, and experience levels are welcome to submit.

• Restaurant Attendees
• Office Background
• Coat Check Staff
• Main Server #1 & Server #2
• Street Pedestrians
• Train Passengers

SHOOT DATES
August 21–24, 2026
Vancouver, BC
VOLUNTEER / IN-KIND PRODUCTION
Participants will receive: Screen Credit, Professional BTS Stills, Reel/Portfolio Material, Film Copy Upon Completion, Priority on Next Paid, Project, Targeting Festival Submission

TO SUBMIT
Email: **gnothefilm@gmail.com** (FULL NAME, HEIGHT, LOCATION, UNION STATUS, HEADSHOT, RESUME / REEL (if available), ROLE OF INTEREST & AVAILABILITY

"Five Black women. One Friday. Everything unsaid."

items.summary:
# **CASTING** **CALL** — Girls' Night Out Short Film **SUPPORTING & BG**

A cinematic short film about five Black women navigating one Friday evening together in Vancouver, BC.
We are currently casting Supporting Roles and Background Performers. Seeking performers from all experience levels.

SUPPORTING ROLES 
GLADYS: 40s–60s, White Female, Office colleague
COLLEAGUE #1: Late 20s–30s, White Female, Office colleague
LISA: Late 20s–40s, Female, Open Ethnicity, Possibly Voice Over, One-liner
COLLEAGUE #2: Late 20s–40s, White Male, One-liner
COLLEAGUE #3: Late 20s–40s, White Male, One-liner
OLDER MAN: 60+, Male, Open Ethnicity, Apartment neighbour, One-liner

BACKGROUND PERFORMERS To authentically reflect the cultural richness & diversity of Vancouver, we especially encourage submissions from Indigenous, Black, Latino, East Asian, South Asian, Southeast Asian, Middle Eastern, Mixed-Race, and White performers. All ethnicities, backgrounds, body types, abilities, and experience levels are welcome to submit.

• Restaurant Attendees
• Office Background
• Coat Check Staff
• Main Server #1 & Server #2
• Street Pedestrians
• Train Passengers

SHOOT DATES
August 21–24, 2026
Vancouver, BC
VOLUNTEER / IN-KIND PRODUCTION
Participants will receive: Screen Credit, Professional BTS Stills, Reel/Portfolio Material, Film Copy Upon Completion, Priority on Next Paid, Project, Targeting Festival Submission

TO SUBMIT
Email: **gnothefilm@gmail.com** (FULL NAME, HEIGHT, LOCATION, UNION STATUS, HEADSHOT, RESUME / REEL (if available), ROLE OF INTEREST & AVAILABILITY

"Five Black women. One Friday. Everything unsaid."

items.text:
Urgently seeking a male-identifying actor for "Cryptophasia"! If interested, please contact stagebugztheatre@gmail.com asap!

All details at: [[https://www.stagebugztheatre.com/auditions](https://www.stagebugztheatre.com/auditions)](https://www.stagebugztheatre.com/auditions?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExV3RXeUh4bEozcTA4WGZEMnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR6wuYcyKwdVXjka-8n85mtcPepsYDaVlZl5AhJEWK7jZmcpT2zQ4DYs9KYpIg_aem_JXKrh2NpoDhdGHQn3VfNXw)

**Dates:**

Rehearsals will be held June 30th through July 18th on select weekdays and Saturdays.  Rehearsal schedule is flexible for this role.

Rehearsals will primarily be located at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial)

**Tech rehearsals:** July 20th-22nd at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

**Performances: **July 23rd, 24th, and 25th at 7 PM; July 26th at 2 PM, at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

Compensation: $100 stipend plus portion of profits

**Show Synopsis:**

Cryptophasia (N)- The phenomenon of an autonomous language developed by twins that only the two children can understand.

​

Anna and Bella Lavey, soul mates and identical twins joined at the hip, have grown up believing that they cannot live without each other. But when Anna develops a fatal heart condition, the girls are confronted with the true cost of freedom--if such a thing even exists at all. At its core, this play explores the universality of having an identity thrust upon us, one which both binds and defines us.

**Character Description:**

Unk/Dr. Truman (Male-identifying, 18+ to play 30s-60s)- Actor will double as Missy's goofy, somewhat oblivious father and Anna and Bella's caring but emotionally guarded pediatrician.

items.text:
Hello! We’re looking for actors to play a **few different archetypes** for a series of **comedic chess instructional videos**. Each of these videos will be about two minutes long, and will teach a certain chess concept (like forks, how the pieces move, etc.). These videos are meant, more than anything, to be entertaining to kids, so you don’t need to have a comprehensive understanding of chess – you just need to be awesome in front of the camera (and very comfortable with improv, which will be an integral part of the performance!)

**Archetypes:**

**The Knight**:
* Overly noble, dramatic (can never tell a lie)
* Chess etiquette, honor (saying good game, not knocking pieces off the board etc.)
* Can only move around like a knight on a checkerboard floor.

**Substitute teacher:**
* Barely understands what’s happening
* Mispronounces chess terms confidently
* Accidentally stumbles into brilliant moves
* Tries to maintain control while the board collapses

**Conspiracy theorist**
* Thinks every pawn move is part of a secret government plot
* Has strings and arrows connecting random squares
* Correctly predicts tactics for completely insane reasons
* Believes bishops are “working together”

**Guitar Riff Guy**
* Punctuates explanations with wicked guitar riffs and occasional power chords
* If actor has long hair or uses wig, could be played with hair always obscuring face
* Could be played as “stoner” if no direct references to drugs
* Could play culturally appropriate music to the ethnicity of the particular opening or tactic

**Kind, but Extremely Aggressive Grandma (or Grandpa)**
* Gentle voice, homemade cookies, knits between moves
* Absolutely explodes the board with bombastic tactics.
* “Hold still, dearie. This fork won’t hurt a bit.”
* “Everybody deserves a second chance,” “Really?” “No, not in this position”

**SHOOTING INFO**

**Shooting Days: **We are going to be shooting videos every Sunday from 9 AM to 1 PM, starting most likely in mid July and ending in the distant future. You do not need to commit to all Sundays, since each video will feature at most two archetypes, and the ones listed are not comprehensive.

**Location: **We’ll be shooting in a makeshift studio space most likely at my house, which is in Aurora, right next to Denver.

**Compensation: **We can give you $80.00 per gig, as well as snacks and water on set. You will also get a final edited video for your reel.

**AUDITION INFO**

We will be hosting auditions at the Hilton Garden Inn Denver Tech Center (7675 E Union Ave

Denver, CO 80237) on Sunday, June 28th, from 9 AM to 3 PM. If you are available at that time, kindly sign up here (https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10C0D49A4AA2DA2F9C25-64447393-chess) and let us know what 10 minute window works best, as well as what archetypes you’d like to audition for (can be more than one).

If you cannot make it during that time, that is totally OK! We also have a remote audition option. If you would like to audition remotely, or if you have any questions, kindly email *jakewunger@gmail.com* and let me know!

Thank you very much!

Jake Unger

[[[[https://jakeunger.carrd.co/](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fjakeunger.carrd.co%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSFhpSWFVYllocDJBbk5PTXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR7Y7JCILWNd3yvE1Nh1rAFsmaii9B1hqP69vEkknXK4PWP1KH964zVA1l7Klg_aem_JSvt9qfa3ilmpl-4Rd-gfw&h=AUDJAez2lbyKljn5b9DB16ZyUiirZzKutiPLzCot-j_gnrh07PlMumJ0u7xVoPr5rG3997kxRv3m5923QPKnPBPa9dVb-itwVIlCi02g7MDtSOHqCussaOGDOKb57GFX6ghm&__tn__=-U-UK-R&c[0]=AUDOMufnGfttsbMYDEV8X0hXAcgWXCp45JzSgOhgwjVFBqjSO98PUaPnUMdxyybSVB_c0pdlF-OTnvYYKlCwSKzOtbiP-TBbQCwc7_KrF2Qx_H-TCwO_FenUyxxv2cd4lDwC89OFL5l9Sz0CGZY9VwjpRDXmkyS835zxbU09MWo0uQ)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fjakeunger.carrd.co%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSFhpSWFVYllocDJBbk5PTXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR4YIVuSRKBgjqgqOt70vL8Wze6e7yp3wDWXf5mVI9G2kw9V4hDNbZPAp41lGg_aem_8lt0y9Th0MenYdO8jRzXeg&h=AUDJAez2lbyKljn5b9DB16ZyUiirZzKutiPLzCot-j_gnrh07PlMumJ0u7xVoPr5rG3997kxRv3m5923QPKnPBPa9dVb-itwVIlCi02g7MDtSOHqCussaOGDOKb57GFX6ghm&__tn__=-U-UK-R&c[0]=AUDOMufnGfttsbMYDEV8X0hXAcgWXCp45JzSgOhgwjVFBqjSO98PUaPnUMdxyybSVB_c0pdlF-OTnvYYKlCwSKzOtbiP-TBbQCwc7_KrF2Qx_H-TCwO_FenUyxxv2cd4lDwC89OFL5l9Sz0CGZY9VwjpRDXmkyS835zxbU09MWo0uQ)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fjakeunger.carrd.co%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSFhpSWFVYllocDJBbk5PTXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5RfwhAE6cPTf_AfSTOLxPeDNxrb0B-mCTmxEdVxvrnF4P3tgUP1xUULRdJYA_aem_a-jhprZs6s-moP5anA2myA&h=AUDJAez2lbyKljn5b9DB16ZyUiirZzKutiPLzCot-j_gnrh07PlMumJ0u7xVoPr5rG3997kxRv3m5923QPKnPBPa9dVb-itwVIlCi02g7MDtSOHqCussaOGDOKb57GFX6ghm&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AUDOMufnGfttsbMYDEV8X0hXAcgWXCp45JzSgOhgwjVFBqjSO98PUaPnUMdxyybSVB_c0pdlF-OTnvYYKlCwSKzOtbiP-TBbQCwc7_KrF2Qx_H-TCwO_FenUyxxv2cd4lDwC89OFL5l9Sz0CGZY9VwjpRDXmkyS835zxbU09MWo0uQ)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fjakeunger.carrd.co%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSFhpSWFVYllocDJBbk5PTXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR7s1SxnYbzI353sR61gJPwaj3F9LYMZrMDS-EmcP30gkd9mUc_Hlfd3kG0ZmA_aem_F_upAT82iJscrafN1gVYEA&h=AUDJAez2lbyKljn5b9DB16ZyUiirZzKutiPLzCot-j_gnrh07PlMumJ0u7xVoPr5rG3997kxRv3m5923QPKnPBPa9dVb-itwVIlCi02g7MDtSOHqCussaOGDOKb57GFX6ghm&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AUDOMufnGfttsbMYDEV8X0hXAcgWXCp45JzSgOhgwjVFBqjSO98PUaPnUMdxyybSVB_c0pdlF-OTnvYYKlCwSKzOtbiP-TBbQCwc7_KrF2Qx_H-TCwO_FenUyxxv2cd4lDwC89OFL5l9Sz0CGZY9VwjpRDXmkyS835zxbU09MWo0uQ)

* Gentle voice, homemade cookies, knits between moves
* Absolutely explodes the board with bombastic tactics.
* “Hold still, dearie. This fork won’t hurt a bit.”
* “Everybody deserves a second chance,” “Really?” “No, not in this position”

**SHOOTING INFO**

**Shooting Days: **We are going to be shooting videos every Sunday from 9 AM to 1 PM, starting most likely in mid July and ending in the distant future. You do not need to commit to all Sundays, since each video will feature at most two archetypes, and the ones listed are not comprehensive.

**Location: **We’ll be shooting in a makeshift studio space most likely at my house, which is in Aurora, right next to Denver.

**Compensation: **We can give you $80.00 per gig, as well as snacks and water on set. You will also get a final edited video for your reel.

**AUDITION INFO**

We will be hosting auditions at the Hilton Garden Inn Denver Tech Center (7675 E Union Ave

Denver, CO 80237) on Sunday, June 28th, from 9 AM to 3 PM. If you are available at that time, kindly sign up here (https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10C0D49A4AA2DA2F9C25-64447393-chess) and let us know what 10 minute window works best, as well as what archetypes you’d like to audition for (can be more than one).

If you cannot make it during that time, that is totally OK! We also have a remote audition option. If you would like to audition remotely, or if you have any questions, kindly email *jakewunger@gmail.com* and let me know!

Thank you very much!

Jake Unger

[[[[https://jakeunger.carrd.co/](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fjakeunger.carrd.co%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSFhpSWFVYllocDJBbk5PTXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR7Y7JCILWNd3yvE1Nh1rAFsmaii9B1hqP69vEkknXK4PWP1KH964zVA1l7Klg_aem_JSvt9qfa3ilmpl-4Rd-gfw&h=AUDJAez2lbyKljn5b9DB16ZyUiirZzKutiPLzCot-j_gnrh07PlMumJ0u7xVoPr5rG3997kxRv3m5923QPKnPBPa9dVb-itwVIlCi02g7MDtSOHqCussaOGDOKb57GFX6ghm&__tn__=-U-UK-R&c[0]=AUDOMufnGfttsbMYDEV8X0hXAcgWXCp45JzSgOhgwjVFBqjSO98PUaPnUMdxyybSVB_c0pdlF-OTnvYYKlCwSKzOtbiP-TBbQCwc7_KrF2Qx_H-TCwO_FenUyxxv2cd4lDwC89OFL5l9Sz0CGZY9VwjpRDXmkyS835zxbU09MWo0uQ)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fjakeunger.carrd.co%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSFhpSWFVYllocDJBbk5PTXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR4YIVuSRKBgjqgqOt70vL8Wze6e7yp3wDWXf5mVI9G2kw9V4hDNbZPAp41lGg_aem_8lt0y9Th0MenYdO8jRzXeg&h=AUDJAez2lbyKljn5b9DB16ZyUiirZzKutiPLzCot-j_gnrh07PlMumJ0u7xVoPr5rG3997kxRv3m5923QPKnPBPa9dVb-itwVIlCi02g7MDtSOHqCussaOGDOKb57GFX6ghm&__tn__=-U-UK-R&c[0]=AUDOMufnGfttsbMYDEV8X0hXAcgWXCp45JzSgOhgwjVFBqjSO98PUaPnUMdxyybSVB_c0pdlF-OTnvYYKlCwSKzOtbiP-TBbQCwc7_KrF2Qx_H-TCwO_FenUyxxv2cd4lDwC89OFL5l9Sz0CGZY9VwjpRDXmkyS835zxbU09MWo0uQ)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fjakeunger.carrd.co%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSFhpSWFVYllocDJBbk5PTXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5RfwhAE6cPTf_AfSTOLxPeDNxrb0B-mCTmxEdVxvrnF4P3tgUP1xUULRdJYA_aem_a-jhprZs6s-moP5anA2myA&h=AUDJAez2lbyKljn5b9DB16ZyUiirZzKutiPLzCot-j_gnrh07PlMumJ0u7xVoPr5rG3997kxRv3m5923QPKnPBPa9dVb-itwVIlCi02g7MDtSOHqCussaOGDOKb57GFX6ghm&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AUDOMufnGfttsbMYDEV8X0hXAcgWXCp45JzSgOhgwjVFBqjSO98PUaPnUMdxyybSVB_c0pdlF-OTnvYYKlCwSKzOtbiP-TBbQCwc7_KrF2Qx_H-TCwO_FenUyxxv2cd4lDwC89OFL5l9Sz0CGZY9VwjpRDXmkyS835zxbU09MWo0uQ)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fjakeunger.carrd.co%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSFhpSWFVYllocDJBbk5PTXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR7s1SxnYbzI353sR61gJPwaj3F9LYMZrMDS-EmcP30gkd9 items.text: Calling actors: Mary is casting. This women-led surreal psychological short follows a young woman as an interview meant to reclaim her story begins to spiral into something invasive and unsettling. We’re looking for thoughtful, collaborative performers excited by bold independent work. Send your headshot, resume/reel, and availability to cassiebeddor@gmail.com. Please note that this is unpaid and is expenses only.

attachments.ocrText: May be a black-and-white image of text that says 'CASTING!!! We're re casting Mary, a surreal psychological short film about image, control, and what happens when the act of being seen becomes something invasive. This is α women-written, women-directed, women- produced independent short, and we're looking for grounded, expressive actors excited to help bring this unsettling world to life. Please email cassiebeddor@gmail.com with your headshot, resume/reel, and availability and the role you are applying for in the subject line'

May be an image of text that says 'AVAILABLE ROLES: : PRINCIPAL CAST AND MARY PLAYING AGE: LATE 20S- EARLY 30S ROLE SIZE: LEAD A SOCIAL MEDIA FIGURE WRITER TRYING to REGAIN CONTROL OF HER PUBLIC IMAGE AFTER A PUBLIC DIVORCE AND CHEATING SCANDAL. MARY BEGINS COMPOSED AND GUARDED, BUT BECOMES INCREASINGLY UNSETTLED AS INTERVIEW TURNS INVASIVE AND SURREAL. ALLISON PLAYING AGE: MID 40S ROLE SIZE: SUPPORTING AN EXPERIENCED INTERVIEWER/JOURNALIST WHO ARRIVES AT MARY'S HOME WITH WARMTH, CONFIDENCE, AND A CLEAR AGENDA. CHARMING ON THE SURFACE, BUT INCREASINGLY RUTHLESS IN PURSUIT OF A MORE SENSATIONAL STORY.'

May be an image of text that says 'SMALL ROLES/DAYPLAYERS MAKEUP ARTIST PLAYING AGE:30-50 ROLE SIZE: SMALL SUPPORTING PART OF THE INTERVIEW CREW. ADJUSTS MARY'S APPEARANCE FOR THE CAMERA. ASSISTANT PLAYING AGE: 20-5- ROLE SIZE: SMALL SUPPORTING ALLISON'S ASSISTANT, PRESENT DURING THE INTERVIEW SETUP AND PRODUCTION. CAMERA OPERATOR / CAMERAMAN PLAYING AGE: OPEN ROLE SIZE: FEATURED SUPPORTING OPERATES THE INTERVIEW CAMERA AND RESPONDS to ALLISON'S CUES FOR BUILDING THE SENSE THAT MARY IS BEING WATCHED AND CAPTURED. PHOTOGRAPHER PLAYING AGE: OPEN ROLE SIZE: FEATURED SUPPORTING TAKES PHOTOGRAPHS DURING THE INTERVIEW AND OUTSIDE MARY'S HOME. ADDS to THE PRESSURE, SPECTACLE, AND PUBLIC SCRUTINY SURROUNDING MARY.'

May be an image of text that says 'FEATURED BACKGROUND & ENSEMBLE INTERVIEW CREW MEMBERS NUMBER NEEDED: 3 PLAYING AGE: OPEN CREW MEMBERS WHO SET UP LIGHTS, EQUIPMENT, CAMERAS, AND PROPS INSIDE MARY'S HOME. THEY SHOULD FEEL BUSY, EFFICIENT, AND SLIGHTLY INVASIVE. (COULD DOUBLE UP WITH SOME OF PAPARAZZI NUMBER NEEDED: OUR CREW?) PLAYING AGE: OPEN PHOTOGRAPHERS OUTSIDE MARY'S HOUSE AND/OR VISIBLE DURING THE MEDIA FRENZY. THEY CREATE E EXTERNAL PRESSURE OF PUBLIC ATTENTION. FANS NUMBER NEEDED: 3-5 PLAYING AGE: TEENS to EARLY 20S A SMALL GROUP OF FANS WHO RECOGNISE MARY, TAKE PHOTOS, AND ESTABLISH HER PUBLIC VISIBILITY AT THE BEGINNING OF THE FILM.'

items.text:
*Please could you share with anyone you might know with weird football superstitions?!*

We're looking for people with Football based superstitions as new data shows 44% of UK fans engage in some form of football superstition and 3.7 million wear lucky pants while watching England! Do you know someone who has a pre-football ritual in hopes of their team scoring? Or someone who has to wear a certain pair of socks to a game? 

Ideally they’ll be happy being pictured and commenting on their unusual superstition!

Message me here or jackmcardle@hatch.group

items.text:
🎬 EXTRAS WANTED – PROJECT 79

We are looking for paid background artists for an exciting night shoot taking place on 28th & 29th June 2026.

📍 Filming Location: Stoke-on-Trent
🚌 Transport: Provided from Birmingham
👥 Ages: 18–50
🌍 Ethnicity: White/Caucasian males and females
🌙 Night Shoot
💰 Paid role

Please specify whether you are available on 28th June, 29th June, or both dates.

📩 To apply, send us a DM on Instagram (@bena.entertainment) or email us at benaentertainmenthouse@gmail.com with:

• Recent full-length solo photos
• Your full name
• Contact number
• Your availability for the listed dates
• Your travel plan (Birmingham pickup or self-drive)

Feel free to share this opportunity with anyone who may be interested!

items.text:
**HI EVERYONE! I AM LOOKIG FOR THE FOLLOWING CREW FOR A SHORT FILM IN BOSTON MA!**
* **First Assistant Director**
* **Production Manager**
* **Head of Set Design**

**COMP: PROFIT SHARING / DEFERRED PAY**

**EMAIL: LeeMonte617@gmail.com **with your NAME & POSITION of interest on subject header. 

**STORY:** A couple in love argue over a major life decision when the boyfriend, believing he's going to die, brings up the strange occurrences that alludes to his death; in essence, just as they find love, the unthinkable and unbelievable happens. 

**Days of Production: **5 Days

**Pre-Production: **July 2026 - September 2026** ( **can change** )**

**Production: Fall ( **September / October 2026 **)**

**Location: **Massachusetts **(** Boston / Greater Boston **)**

**Team Size: **15 - 20

items.text:
Looking for a Product Photographer (LA Local ONLY)
We’re looking for an experienced product photographer for a 2-day commercial shoot.

Dates: June 27–28

Rate: $500/day

Hours: 10 hours/day

Requirements:

• Experience in commercial and product photography preferred

• Please note: we are not looking for portrait-only photographers

To apply, please send:

• Your portfolio / previous work

• Contact information

Email: neekosfilm@gmail.com

Looking forward to seeing your work!

items.text:
Hiring – Art Director / Production Designer

Kentwood Films International is looking for a talented and creative Art Director / Production Designer for an upcoming independent feature film shooting in Chicago and surrounding suburbs.

We are specifically seeking experienced professionals based in the Chicago area.

Position: Art Director / Production Designer

Compensation: This is a paid position (compensation based on experience)

To Apply: Please send your portfolio, resume, and/or previous work samples to: kentwoodcinemas@gmail.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Praktikant:in gesucht- Schauspielworkshop Showreel-Produktion actingcoach. sucht für den Zeitraum Mitte Juli bis Ende Juli eine engagierte Praktikantin oder einen engagierten Praktikanten zur Unterstützung bei einem intensiven Camera-Acting-Workshop und professionellen Showreel-Dreharbeiten in Hamburg. Deine Aufgaben *Unterstützung bei den Dreharbeiten *Assistenz bei der Workshop-O shop-Organisation *Betreuung von Schauspieler:innen am Set *Unterstützung bei Produktion und Ablauf Das bringst du mit Interesse an Film, Schauspiel oder Medienproduktion *Zuverlässigkeit und Teamgeist *Selbstständige Arbeitsweise *Freude am Umgang mit Menschen Das Praktikum bietet spannende Einblicke in professionelles Schauspielcoaching Camera Acting und die Produktion hochwertiger Showreels. Bewerbung per E-Mail an: info@actingcoach.de actingcoach. Tlicoaoinosaneratrdd filmcoaching.'

items.text:
Möchtest du Kontakte in der Unterhaltungsbranche knüpfen? Dann ist IndustryMe genau das Richtige für dich. IndustryMe ist eine Plattform, die sich exklusiv an Personen richtet, die sich weltweit mit anderen aus allen Bereichen der Film- und Unterhaltungsbranche vernetzen möchten. Egal, ob du Schauspieler, Filmemacher, Produzent, Casting-Direktor, Musiker oder Crew-Mitglied bist oder hinter den Kulissen in den Bereichen Recht, Marketing oder Business arbeitest – IndustryMe.net ist der ideale Ort für neue Kontakte.

Melde dich noch heute an und knüpfe Verbindungen, die deine Karriere voranbringen! #IndustryMe

items.text:
🎬 Darstellerin / Model für Musikvideo gesucht! (NRW, gerne auch Newcomer)

Hey zusammen! 👋

Ich bin Max Konstanty :) Für den Dreh meines kommenden Musikvideos sind mein Label (END BUILD BEGIN) und ich auf der Suche nach einem weiblichen Gesicht für die Kamera. Anhand des hier gepostete Videos könnt ihr euch ein Bild von Sound und Look machen. Die neue Single (Auskopplung aus meinem Album "Luxus", das Ende August erscheint) schicken wir euch vor dem Dreh zu.

Das Projekt:
Es gibt keine komplexe Storyline oder Dialoge – der Fokus liegt komplett auf ästhetischen, cinematischen Shots, die die Stimmung des Songs einfangen. Du musst keine Texte lernen oder unbedingt Schauspielerfahrung mitbringen. Es geht um Ausstrahlung, Mimik, Posen und coole Bilder.

Wen wir suchen:

Alter: ca. 20 bis 40 Jahre

Größe: bis ca. 1,75 m

Erfahrung ist nicht zwingend notwendig!

Die Rahmendaten:

📍 Location: Niederrhein

📅 Datum: Juli/August 2026

💰 Vergütung: 200 Euro für 5-6 Stunden Dreh plus Verpflegung.

Interesse?
Dann schreib mir einfach eine kurze PN! Bitte schick direkt Folgendes mit:

1–2 aktuelle Fotos von dir, dein Alter, Größe und ungefähren Wohnort (Handybilder reichen völlig aus)

(Optional) Link zu deinem Instagram, falls du magst.

Wir freuen uns auf deine Pn und beantworte auch gerne vorab alle Fragen :) Vielen Dank.

items.text:
*The gift we give actors they give back to us tenfold. Claim this**[ FREE ONCE A YEAR OPPORTUNITY FOR ACTORS](https://www.screenactingschool.com/true-webinar-registration-page-1?fbclid=IwAR1jBMysRByB2XoevczFwjG5ZLyCrdKodw1vfBtqGUq9mr_WZnrHj6o_nvo) **to help you book leads in series and films year after year! Do not miss this free class to create the 2024 of your dreams.*

You know how terrible things come in threes? I bet you do and I sure do. 13 years ago I was coaching high profile actors ([you’d know their names](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.screenactingschool.com%2Ftrue-webinar-registration-page-1%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR1GBUt1dxQ5NDEEW4KNG3MN4rC6qKX3dgBNZOIHAb228X3q3FjHS-XwV-M&h=AT1NZrQlLntMatxZYQ0EVe1b0PDsXR3117L-ft-R87Myr8Kw5y6nyRZVBgqZBqO8bofBlenG05hGTNgz9SukPTpY_Duu8bMXokWB5CgdS8SGp95YVacWQsWSGbJEFqFG9gRYk62Ke2Gor8gEb_c-ld5zYQ&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT1QMFolJHTw0eDLxxcH9XqPOFU_22-xWW-M5xngsuW_lraCXblcF9okU_1c5JNm-fSoW0tdOQHiT7Hm3BtUlOew1ELxiP7Sn4DImb4NYk8VeMwDZKTCDtq5HOTzEVPA2Yz2bjj_EmkWVQbbRWC7uxGcabx6N9s6WA4z-uAGPAZHLO6UYDCX4cE_i2DBMmo8YH7eEsL9n1mNmf8tKGJM4LwFufRbdwLQpO8)) but I was in a third degree burn kind of low spot - no friends, no family and definitely no fortune.

***Suddenly, I realized something life changing and [TRUE.](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.screenactingschool.com%2Ftrue-webinar-registration-page-1%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR29qUK0xzKYBGHDsU2Pu0lPI7Ym4H24-QzhFQfCYy2KhnoNoEHvge-1wgM&h=AT1NZrQlLntMatxZYQ0EVe1b0PDsXR3117L-ft-R87Myr8Kw5y6nyRZVBgqZBqO8bofBlenG05hGTNgz9SukPTpY_Duu8bMXokWB5CgdS8SGp95YVacWQsWSGbJEFqFG9gRYk62Ke2Gor8gEb_c-ld5zYQ&__tn__=-U-U-UK-R&c[0]=AT1QMFolJHTw0eDLxxcH9XqPOFU_22-xWW-M5xngsuW_lraCXblcF9okU_1c5JNm-fSoW0tdOQHiT7Hm3BtUlOew1ELxiP7Sn4DImb4NYk8VeMwDZKTCDtq5HOTzEVPA2Yz2bjj_EmkWVQbbRWC7uxGcabx6N9s6WA4z-uAGPAZHLO6UYDCX4cE_i2DBMmo8YH7eEsL9n1mNmf8tKGJM4LwFufRbdwLQpO8)***

***[Click here to claim this rare opportunity to create the 2024 of your dreams.](https://www.screenactingschool.com/true-webinar-registration-page-1?fbclid=IwAR3XQox_pzy-I28fvyp-uOSjjNWG0rCY08DPy7R0k4jlyxQ38NXFD3155v4)***

*The gift we give actors they give back to us tenfold. Claim this**[ FREE ONCE A YEAR OPPORTUNITY FOR ACTORS](https://www.screenactingschool.com/true-webinar-registration-page-1?fbclid=IwAR1jBMysRByB2XoevczFwjG5ZLyCrdKodw1vfBtqGUq9mr_WZnrHj6o_nvo) **to help you book leads in series and films year after year! Do not miss this free class to create the 2024 of your dreams.*

You know how terrible things come in threes? I bet you do and I sure do. 13 years ago I was coaching high profile actors ([you’d know their names](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.screenactingschool.com%2Ftrue-webinar-registration-page-1%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR1GBUt1dxQ5NDEEW4KNG3MN4rC6qKX3dgBNZOIHAb228X3q3FjHS-XwV-M&h=AT1NZrQlLntMatxZYQ0EVe1b0PDsXR3117L-ft-R87Myr8Kw5y6nyRZVBgqZBqO8bofBlenG05hGTNgz9SukPTpY_Duu8bMXokWB5CgdS8SGp95YVacWQsWSGbJEFqFG9gRYk62Ke2Gor8gEb_c-ld5zYQ&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT1QMFolJHTw0eDLxxcH9XqPOFU_22-xWW-M5xngsuW_lraCXblcF9okU_1c5JNm-fSoW0tdOQHiT7Hm3BtUlOew1ELxiP7Sn4DImb4NYk8VeMwDZKTCDtq5HOTzEVPA2Yz2bjj_EmkWVQbbRWC7uxGcabx6N9s6WA4z-uAGPAZHLO6UYDCX4cE_i2DBMmo8YH7eEsL9n1mNmf8tKGJM4LwFufRbdwLQpO8)) but I was in a third degree burn kind of low spot - no friends, no family and definitely no fortune.

***Suddenly, I realized something life changing and [TRUE.](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.screenactingschool.com%2Ftrue-webinar-registration-page-1%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR29qUK0xzKYBGHDsU2Pu0lPI7Ym4H24-QzhFQfCYy2KhnoNoEHvge-1wgM&h=AT1NZrQlLntMatxZYQ0EVe1b0PDsXR3117L-ft-R87Myr8Kw5y6nyRZVBgqZBqO8bofBlenG05hGTNgz9SukPTpY_Duu8bMXokWB5CgdS8SGp95YVacWQsWSGbJEFqFG9gRYk62Ke2Gor8gEb_c-ld5zYQ&__tn__=-U-U-UK-R&c[0]=AT1QMFolJHTw0eDLxxcH9XqPOFU_22-xWW-M5xngsuW_lraCXblcF9okU_1c5JNm-fSoW0tdOQHiT7Hm3BtUlOew1ELxiP7Sn4DImb4NYk8VeMwDZKTCDtq5HOTzEVPA2Yz2bjj_EmkWVQbbRWC7uxGcabx6N9s6WA4z-uAGPAZHLO6UYDCX4cE_i2DBMmo8YH7eEsL9n1mNmf8tKGJM4LwFufRbdwLQpO8)***

items.text:
**You're getting auditions.**

**People tell you you're talented.**

**So why aren't you booking?**

Here's something we wish more actors knew:

You can be incredibly talented and still not book.

Those things are not mutually exclusive.

In this free class replay, we break down the five things that stop great actors from booking and the simple fixes that make auditions feel more truthful, connected, and memorable.

Because the problem usually isn't talent.

**It's that nobody ever taught you how casting actually experiences an audition.**

🎥 Watch the replay now:

[https://youtu.be/7aGQgp8Pbzk?si=yK3iZXxGNJSEHM0N](https://youtu.be/7aGQgp8Pbzk?si=yK3iZXxGNJSEHM0N)

If you've ever wondered, "What am I missing?" This class is for you.

items.text:
Turn VO Auditions Into Bookings

Marc Graue’s audition techniques focus on making strong, authentic choices, bringing scripts to life, and standing out in a crowded marketplace. His animation character training helps actors create memorable, believable characters with unique voices, personalities, and emotional depth—skills that can elevate both auditions and bookings

items.text:
Booking photo sessions in Los Angeles for July & August

Need headshots? I'm a portrait photographer offering packages for actors to have the essentials and help brand themselves across multiple platforms, from casting sites to social media.

These packages include headshots, full body shots, stylized photos and candids. I also offer high quality scene tapes. As a filmmaker with experience in casting, I want to make sure that you not only have the media you need, but are best marketing yourself to get the types of roles you want!

You can find more of my work on my website www.mariellebosco.com or instagram.com/mariellebosco and can contact me via DMs or email bosco.marielle@gmail.com.

Hi everyone,
Larius Productions are looking for 2 actors and an actress for their next production at the Bread and Roses theatre for a weeks run in  November. Profit share. This is a fun play with a degree of adult content surrounding relationships. So please keep this in mind when applying.

Characters of

 Edward (lawyer) An extroverted, aggressive, and somewhat sleazy criminal defense lawyer.playing age  35 to 45. Must have height  min  5ft 10

George  well-meaning but somewhat nerdy and controlling academic who teaches political philosophy. Playing age 35 to 45. must have  height min 5ft 10

Lydia, A kind-hearted but betrayed woman with a hardened exterior. Andrew’s fiancée and Edward’s ex-girlfriend. Playing age 35 to 45

Please email sonya_namik@yahoo.co.uk with submissions.. headshot, and spotlight link.

items.text:
Szczegóły dotyczące castingu z grafiki powyżej! 🌟
Poszukujemy dziewczynki w wieku 6-9 lat do projektu dla popularnej, irlandzkiej sieci sklepów z zabawkami i artykułami dziecięcymi. 🎈
Do udziału zapraszamy dziewczynki o pochodzeniu słowiańskim oraz people of color . Zależy nam na pokazaniu autentycznego, radosnego i wielobarwnego świata dzieci – dokładnie takiego, jaki na co dzień widzimy w sklepach z zabawkami! 🧸
📸 Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy w wiadomości prywatnej (DM), bądz poprzez kontakt przez naszą stronę internetową https://castella.pl/

items.title: Szczegóły dotyczące castingu z grafiki powyżej! 🌟

items.text:
**KRAKÓW - ŚPIEWAJĄCY AKTORZY POSZUKIWANI - ZLECENIE DOBRZE PŁATNE**

Do spotu reklamowego dla producenta słodyczy poszukuję:

**- 2 kobiety młodsze (35-45 lat) // do 2 scen**

aktorki/ grający naturszczycy z doświadczeniem, naturalne, ciepła energia, nie idealnie piękne / modelowe, spontaniczne, możliwe podobieństwo fizyczne (siostry / kuzynki)

- **mężczyzna (45-55 lat) // do 1 sceny**

aktor/ grający naturszczyk z doświadczeniem, naturalny i autentyczny, nie idealnie piękny / modelowy. Figura - lekko „zasiedziany home office”

- **dzieci:** **dziewczynka (około 7 lat) i chłopiec (około 10 lat) //** **do 1 sceny **

grające - z doświadczeniem przed kamerą, naturalne, autentyczne, radosne i żywiołowe, potrafiące amatorsko tańczyć, możliwe podobieństwo fizyczne (rodzeństwo / kuzyni)

- **3 kobiety starsze (około 50 lat) //** **do 1 sceny **

aktorki/ grający naturszczycy z doświadczeniem, naturalne i autentyczne, bardzo pozytywne, nieskrępowane, żywiołowe, wyraźnie różniące się typem figury i urody, nie idealnie piękne / modelowe

- **babcia (około 70 lat) //** **do 1 sceny **

aktorki/ grający naturszczycy z doświadczeniem, miejska fajna babcia, z luzem i naturalnością, otwarta i z auto dystansem 

**Wymagana umiejętność u wszystkich – śpiew aktorski / dobry śpiew amatorski i doświadczenie przed kamerą!**

Role epizodyczne nie mówione ale śpiewane, na dalszym etapie castingu wybrane osoby poproszę o nagranie wskazanej piosenki. 

**Prawa na 5 lat bez ograniczeń terytorialnych, pola eksploatacji TV, internet, kino, radio, outdoor, POS. **

**Zdjęcia 9 lub 10 lipca 2026 w Krakowie (okolicach)**. Nie zapewniamy noclegu, ewentualnie zwrot kosztów dojazdu (paliwa, bilety na pociąg).

Zgłoszenia wraz ze zdjęciami, wideo wizytówką i danymi do kontaktu proszę przesyłać na adres: castingotwarty@gmail.com w tytule proszę o wpisanie roli, do której się zgłaszacie. 

Nie przyjmuję zaproszeń do znajomych, nie wchodzę w 

konwersacje pod postem i na priv - skontaktuję się z wybranymi osobami.

Dziękuję :)
items.summary:
**KRAKÓW - ŚPIEWAJĄCY AKTORZY POSZUKIWANI - ZLECENIE DOBRZE PŁATNE**

Do spotu reklamowego dla producenta słodyczy poszukuję:

**- 2 kobiety młodsze (35-45 lat) // do 2 scen**

aktorki/ grający naturszczycy z doświadczeniem, naturalne, ciepła energia, nie idealnie piękne / modelowe, spontaniczne, możliwe podobieństwo fizyczne (siostry / kuzynki)

- **mężczyzna (45-55 lat) // do 1 sceny**

aktor/ grający naturszczyk z doświadczeniem, naturalny i autentyczny, nie idealnie piękny / modelowy. Figura - lekko „zasiedziany home office”

- **dzieci:** **dziewczynka (około 7 lat) i chłopiec (około 10 lat) //** **do 1 sceny **

grające - z doświadczeniem przed kamerą, naturalne, autentyczne, radosne i żywiołowe, potrafiące amatorsko tańczyć, możliwe podobieństwo fizyczne (rodzeństwo / kuzyni)

- **3 kobiety starsze (około 50 lat) //** **do 1 sceny **

aktorki/ grający naturszczycy z doświadczeniem, naturalne i autentyczne, bardzo pozytywne, nieskrępowane, żywiołowe, wyraźnie różniące się typem figury i urody, nie idealnie piękne / modelowe

- **babcia (około 70 lat) //** **do 1 sceny **

aktorki/ grający naturszczycy z doświadczeniem, miejska fajna babcia, z luzem i naturalnością, otwarta i z auto dystansem

items.text:
It's all free guys... 

If anyone would like to learn more about acting for screen, this is the workshop to go to! 🫵

sharedPost.text:
Adders Film School is inviting young creatives aged 13–17 to an exclusive, interactive online masterclass. This live, hands-on workshop is designed to give you a genuine taste of the professional film industry.

Whether your passion lies in mastering screen presence or discovering how directors bring a script to life, this session will give you the tools to jumpstart your creative journey. This event offers you an opportunity to rehearse and act out a scene from an original script and get real-time feedback from our experts.

🤫 Shh, we're offering exclusive discounts and priority enrolment for our September intake to our attendees. Hurry and grab a seat by clicking the link in our bio!

#miltonkeynes #actingforscreen #teencreatives #moviebuffs🎬 #teenactivities #addersfilmschool

items.text:
🎬 CASTING – REKLAMA TELEFONII KOMÓRKOWEJ 📱
Warszawa

Zapraszamy do udziału w castingu do reklamy telefonii komórkowej. Główne role w spocie zagrają celebryci, a my poszukujemy osób do ról drugoplanowych.

Poszukiwane role:

👫 Znajomi celebrytów

• kobieta i mężczyzna w wieku 43–54 lata

Szukamy przede wszystkim profesjonalnych aktorów lub utalentowanych epizodystów, którzy dobrze odnajdą się u boku gwiazd. Zależy nam na osobach:

* wyluzowanych,

* wielkomiejskich,

* pełnych energii,

* z wyrazistą osobowością.

Nie poszukujemy raczej osób o jasnych blond włosach.

📅 Terminy:

* Zgłoszenia online: do 28.06 (niedziela), do końca dnia

* Recall: 03.07

* Przymiarki: 06.07

* Zdjęcia: 08–11.07 (termin do potwierdzenia)

💰 Stawki:

Dorośli

* 1500 zł – dzień zdjęciowy

* 2500 zł – prawa do wykorzystania wizerunku

* +20% prowizji agencji

Dzieci

* 1200 zł – dzień zdjęciowy

* 1500 zł – prawa

📧 Zgłoszenia: plan@filmakcja.pl

W tytule maila: wpisz nazwę roli, na którą się zgłaszasz.

W treści maila podaj:

* imię i nazwisko,

* wiek,

* numer telefonu,

* aktualne, wyraźne zdjęcia,

* wizytówkę aktorską.

Wybranym osobom zostaną przesłane:

✅ karta castingowa,

✅ scenka do odegrania,

✅ link do zgłoszenia.

Marta Filmakcja 🎬🎞️🙂

Jodi Purdy Casting Director will be holding Summer Open Casting Calls for Non-Union Actors with Acting Experience, Resumes, Headshots and Reels in New England for PAID Commercial work!

Seeking a Diverse Cast of Characters to represent who we are as Americans to portray Medical Professionals and Patients!

I have cast 90 Actors in 9 PSA Commercials and will be doing more this Summer and Fall!!

For details on the Casting Calls please send an email to:

JodiPurdyCasting@gmail.com
Subj: Non-Union Open Calls 2026

Check out Bill Wood, Cameron Krauth and Juri Love in one of the spots!!

items.summary:
Jodi Purdy Casting Director will be holding Summer Open Casting Calls for Non-Union Actors with Acting Experience, Resumes, Headshots and Reels in New England for PAID Commercial work!

Seeking a Diverse Cast of Characters to represent who we are as Americans to portray Medical Professionals and Patients!

I have cast 90 Actors in 9 PSA Commercials and will be doing more this Summer and Fall!!

For details on the Casting Calls please send an email to:

JodiPurdyCasting@gmail.com
Subj: Non-Union Open Calls 2026

Check out Bill Wood, Cameron Krauth and Juri Love in one of the spots!!

https://www.facebook.com/share/r/17kK4RbiLa/?mibextid=wwXIfr

items.text:
**THE SESSION - VFS STUDENT FILM - NON-UNION** 

Hello, I am Anastasia and I am the Line Producer for “The Session,” a student short film with Vancouver Film School. 

The premise is Niri, a psychologically fractured taxi driver under the investigation of murder, undergoes psychiatric sessions that loosens his grip on reality as he gets flashbacks - blood spreading on the floor and his father’s abuse. He sees himself killing his psychiatrist, Dr. Orms, with the very pen she is using during their session. However, she hands him a diagnosis and says he’s free to go, ending the session calmly. As he exits, Detective Fareth greets him like an old friend, yet now Niri is wearing a completely different outfit with the paper in his hand being blank - revealing that he was never free, but a psychiatric patient all along.

We are accepting submissions for all of the following roles:

**NIRI**
Male, 25-35 y.o., All ethnicities
A man misdiagnosed with schizophrenia actually suffers from DID-- two distinct identities split from his trauma: his gentle, vulnerable self and an alter driven by anger and pain. Subtle clues like memory loss, disconnection, and a history of trauma are woven into him. Deep down Niri knows the truth, but paralyzed by guilt and fear of losing control entirely, he hides it from everyone aware that whoever finds out could become the next victim.

**DR. ORMS**
Female, 40-55 y.o., All ethnicities
Dr. Katerin Orms is a calm, maternal psychiatrist who represents the last remnant of Niri's sanity, confident she can cure him. Her expertise becomes her downfall; she diagnoses him with schizophrenia but fails to see the truth he's hiding. Ironically in her case, the most experienced person in the room is the one most blind to what's really happening.

**DETECTIVE FARETH**
Male, 40-60 y.o., All ethnicities
A lifetime of catching criminals has left Fareth with little patience and no apologies. He operates outside the law not out of malice, but because he knows pressure works. Decades of experience haven't slowed him down; they've just made him colder, sharper, and harder to argue with.

**THE SUSPECT**
Male, 20-30 y.o., All ethnicities
The suspect is nobody, a random guy brought into custody (not entirely legally) by the detective Fareth to answer some questions. Little did the suspect know, is that the detective just made him his twisted objective. The suspect is terrified and very easy to read. From what we hear it seems that it wasn’t his first time in custody, but we could easily deduce that he didn’t want to stay there for long-- this is why he’s agitated and afraid.

**NIRI’S FATHER **
Male, 40-60 y.o., All ethnicities
Though there is no dialogue for this character, The father of Niri was a closed minded man, with an old and retrograde worldview, he served and experienced the second world war as commander, but lost all his glory and respect at the end of it. He was brainwashed with a military mindset and had PTSD. He was violent, unpredictable and angry, so he unloaded all his frustration and what he considered injustice on his innocent son

We are accepting actors from the greater Vancouver area, which is also where we will be filming.

**IF YOU ARE INTERESTED IN ONE OF THESE ROLES**, please send your name, a headshot, a resume, a demo reel, and the role you are auditioning for to ***sessionwdr.o@gmail.com***. Please send by **Wednesday, June 24th, 09:00AM**. 

Chosen actors will then be requested self tapes on Wednesday, June 24th, which will be sent to the production email with more instructions in the initial request. Self tapes are due and callback requests are sent out Friday, June 26th. In-person callbacks will be held on Sunday, June 28th. **We will be shooting July 15th to July 17th. **

This is a Non-Union, Non-paid 10 minute film shot across 3 days. On set meals are fully covered. IMDB Credits provided. We will release the film online and will screen the film to applied festivals.

Male, 40-60 y.o., All ethnicities

He was brainwashed with a military mindset and had PTSD. He was violent, unpredictable and angry, so he unloaded all his frustration and what he considered injustice on his innocent son

We are accepting actors from the greater Vancouver area, which is also where we will be filming.

**IF YOU ARE INTERESTED IN ONE OF THESE ROLES**, please send your name, a headshot, a resume, a demo reel, and the role you are auditioning for to ***sessionwdr.o@gmail.com***. Please send by **Wednesday, June 24th, 09:00AM**. 

Chosen actors will then be requested self tapes on Wednesday, June 24th, which will be sent to the production email with more instructions in the initial request. Self tapes are due and callback requests are sent out Friday, June 26th. In-person callbacks will be held on Sunday, June 28th. **We will be shooting July 15th to July 17th. **

This is a Non-Union, Non-paid 10 minute film shot across 3 days. On set meals are fully covered. IMDB Credits provided. We will release the film online and will screen the film to applied festivals.
items.title: **THE SESSION - VFS STUDENT FILM - NON-UNION**

PRACA DLA AKTOREK, AKTORÓW 🎭
Sezon teatralny 2026/2027

Poszukujemy ambitnych i zaangażowanych aktorów do wyjątkowych grup tworzonych przez ludzi z pasją i pozytywną energią!

📅 Okres pracy: wrzesień 2026 – czerwiec 2027
📍 Miejsce:  Spektakle gramy  na terenie całej Polski (sale widowiskowe)
🚐 Wyjazdy: niedziele z Krakowa
🏠 Powroty: piątki do Krakowa
🛌 Zapewniamy: transport i noclegi

🎬 O spektaklach:
Gramy profesjonalne, pełne energii spektakle repertuarowe dla dzieci i młodzieży. Produkcje przygotowywane są przez doświadczonych reżyserów i mają wysoki poziom artystyczny.

🎭 Czego oczekujemy:
✅ Doświadczenie sceniczne
✅ Dyspozycyjność od końca lipca 2026 (próby w Krakowie – płatne!)
✅ Zaangażowanie i pozytywne nastawienie

💡 Dodatkowe atuty (mile widziane, ale nie obowiązkowe):
🚗 Prawo jazdy kat. B
💻 Umiejętność obsługi sprzętu elektronicznego

💰 Oferujemy:
✔ Wysokie wynagrodzenie (adekwatne do doświadczenia)
✔ Płatne przygotowania i próby
✔ Fantastyczną atmosferę w zespole
✔ 100% satysfakcji z pracy na scenie!

📩 Zgłoszenia (CV + zdjęcie + wizytówka aktorska) prosimy przesyłać na adres:
📧 pracawteatrze@onet.pl

Do zobaczenia na castingach! 🎭

items.text:
The Mountain Took Many

The Himalayas Have Tested Humanity For Generations. Countless Climbers Came Seeking Glory, Adventure, Or Discovery. Some Reached The Summit. Many Never Returned.

This Cinematic Character Represents A Rescuer Who Chose A Different Path. While Others Climbed For Themselves, He Climbed For Those Who Needed Help. Through Blizzards, Avalanches, And Impossible Conditions, He Risked Everything To Bring Others Home.

“THE MOUNTAIN TOOK MANY / NOT HIM” Is More Than A Caption. It Is A Story About Survival, Courage, And Refusing To Surrender When Nature Is At Its Most Powerful. Every Mission Became A Battle Against The Elements.

The Violent Snowstorm, Helicopters Searching The Peaks, And Icy Blue Lighting Create A Survival Adventure Filled With Tension And Heroism. Every Gust Of Wind And Every Step Along The Frozen Ridge Tells The Story Of A Man Who Refused To Be Defeated By The Mountain.

#MountainRescue #Adventure #EpicPoster #SurvivalStory #HollywoodStyle #Himalayas #ViralPost
