items.text:
🎬✨ CASTING CALL – COASTAL ACADEMY CHRISTMAS SPECIAL! ✨🎄

Calling all young performers across Essex and the surrounding areas! 🌟

Have you ever wanted to experience what it’s like to be part of a professional film set? Now’s your chance!

StandUP Productions is opening the doors to actors aged 11–25 for a special one-off episode of our original YouTube teen drama series, Coastal Academy – inspired by classic British school dramas and packed with festive twists! 🎄🎥

⭐ Full day of filming
⭐ Cameras, costumes, make-up and catering
⭐ Work alongside a fantastic cast of young performers
⭐ Gain valuable on-set experience
⭐ Build confidence and develop your screen acting skills
⭐ Capture footage perfect for your acting reel and portfolio
⭐ Ideal for actors wanting training, experience or simply a chance to perform

Whether you’re an experienced actor or looking to gain more practice in front of the camera, we’d love to welcome you onto set for an immersive filming experience unlike any other.

🎬 Coastal Academy Christmas Special
📅 26th August 2026
⏰ 8am–3pm
📍 Maltings witham - Essex
🎭 Ages 11–25

Don’t wait for opportunity… create it. ⭐

📩 To book your place, email dramaschool@standupuk.com or WhatsApp 07857 940008.

 Or 

Follow this link 
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSf0aX0RNxhVz83VxdJmJqvRXcq0zw3EzPoh8lIFwLZbOArF6g/viewform?usp=share_link&ouid=101039691088988050655

sharedPost.text:
🎥 In diesem Reel spricht Mag. Barbara Fahringer-Postl über Betriebsabgaben und Steuer. 

👉 Sei dabei beim nächsten KBF! ✨☕️ 

📍 169. Künstler*innen Business Frühstück 
🗓️ Dienstag, 19.05.2026 – 7:15 Uhr 
🏨 Hotel Zeitgeist Vienna, Sonnwendgasse 15, 1100 Wien 

🎤 Vortrag: Reanne Leuning 
WKÖ – AUSSENWIRTSCHAFT Creative Industries 
🎙️ Moderation: Monika Medek 

Kreativwirtschaft aus Österreich auf der internationalen Bühne 

Wie schaffen heimische Kreative den Sprung auf internationale Märkte? Welche Chancen gibt es für Design, Film, Games, Musik und andere kreative Branchen weltweit? Und welche Unterstützung bietet die Außenwirtschaft dabei? 

Reanne Leuning bringt als Expertin der WKÖ – AUSSENWIRTSCHAFT Creative Industries fundiertes Wissen und internationale Erfahrung mit. Sie begleitet österreichische Kreative und Unternehmen auf ihrem Weg in globale Märkte und zeigt, wie kreative Exporte aus Österreich weltweit Wirkung entfalten können. 

Ein Frühstück für alle, die in der Kreativwirtschaft tätig sind, international denken und neue Perspektiven für ihre Arbeit entdecken möchten. 

© Inshore Films

sharedPost.text:
🎥 In diesem Reel spricht Mag. Barbara Fahringer-Postl über Betriebsabgaben und Steuer. 

👉 Sei dabei beim nächsten KBF! ✨☕️ 

📍 169. Künstler*innen Business Frühstück 
🗓️ Dienstag, 19.05.2026 – 7:15 Uhr 
🏨 Hotel Zeitgeist Vienna, Sonnwendgasse 15, 1100 Wien 

🎤 Vortrag: Reanne Leuning 
WKÖ – AUSSENWIRTSCHAFT Creative Industries 
🎙️ Moderation: Monika Medek 

Kreativwirtschaft aus Österreich auf der internationalen Bühne 

Wie schaffen heimische Kreative den Sprung auf internationale Märkte? Welche Chancen gibt es für Design, Film, Games, Musik und andere kreative Branchen weltweit? Und welche Unterstützung bietet die Außenwirtschaft dabei? 

Reanne Leuning bringt als Expertin der WKÖ – AUSSENWIRTSCHAFT Creative Industries fundiertes Wissen und internationale Erfahrung mit. Sie begleitet österreichische Kreative und Unternehmen auf ihrem Weg in globale Märkte und zeigt, wie kreative Exporte aus Österreich weltweit Wirkung entfalten können. 

Ein Frühstück für alle, die in der Kreativwirtschaft tätig sind, international denken und neue Perspektiven für ihre Arbeit entdecken möchten. 

© Inshore Films 

📲 Mehr Infos: www.KünstlerBusinessFrühstück.at - https://fb.me/e/87oB0vCtd  
 

#künstlerinnenbusinessfrühstück #kbf #zeitgeistvienna #kreativwirtschaft #creativeindustries #aussenwirtschaft #kunstundkultur #wien

sharedPost.text:
Angela Boehm Casting is now casting for a commercial that is filming in the Cleveland, OH area TWO DAYS from July 29th - 30th.
**IMPORTANT NOTE: This is a two day shoot, talent will need to be available for BOTH DAYS.**

DETAILS:
- Project: 'Alpha Aromatics' Commercial
- Filming Location: Cleveland, OH Area (Likely West Side or Lakefront)
- Shoot Date(s): 7/29 & 7/30 (Talent will work BOTH DAYS)
- Rate: $1000 plus 20% per day, guarantee 2 days.
- Usage: Web, social (TikTok, Instagram), and Amazon listings. Full buyout. Lifestyle how-to and product videos, plus stills, for two diffusers

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

OLDER WOMAN:
- Age: 60's-70's
- Gender: Female
- Ethnicity: ANY

YOUNG ADULT:
- Age: 20-35
- Gender: Female
- Ethnicity: Hispanic/LatinX

SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:
In order to submit for this project, you will need to film a self-tape reading the from sides linked below. Please send your video to team@angelaboehmcasting.com. 

SUBJECT LINE: "Alpha Aromatics Submission - YOUR NAME"

Audition Directions:
- Please do not tape outside
- Please have a blank background
- Please put slates at the end of the audition.
- Please keep all videos between 50-100mb!!!
- DEADLINE: EOD Friday, 6.26

CLICK HERE FOR THE AUDITION SIDES: https://bit.ly/ABCAASides

Kind regards,
Angela Boehm Casting Team
PLEASE NOTE: This is just a submission. If you are booked, we will reach out to YOU.

📸 **NABÓR NA SESJĘ KIDWELL** 📸

Poszukujemy dzieci do udziału w plenerowej sesji zdjęciowej marki Kidwell.

 

📅 **Kiedy?**
29.06 – 03.07.2026 (poszukujemy dzieci dostępnych w tym przedziale czasowym – dokładny termin sesji będzie uzależniony od warunków pogodowych).

 

📍 **Gdzie?**
Lusowo (okolice Poznania, gm. Tarnowo Podgórne, woj. wielkopolskie)

 

👧👦 **Kogo szukamy?**
• chłopca o wzroście ok. 95 cm
• dziewczynki o wzroście ok. 95 cm

 

📩 **Zgłoszenia:**
[marketing@derform.com.pl](mailto:marketing@derform.com.pl)

 

⏳ **Termin nadsyłania zgłoszeń:**
do 24.06.2026 r.

 

💰 **ZLECENIE ODPŁATNE**

W zgłoszeniu prosimy o przesłanie aktualnych zdjęć dziecka oraz informacji o jego wzroście i wieku.

 

Zastrzegamy sobie kontakt z wybranymi osobami.

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL — SHORT FILM | STASZÓW, WOJEWÓDZTWO ŚWIĘTOKRZYSKIE

We have an idea we are completely obsessed with — and we need the right people to help us bring it to life.

This is a short dramatic film made on a micro budget, the kind of project that makes you forget what it cost to make it. We believe in this story with everything we have, and we are building something that will make people stop and watch. Our goal is to submit to European film festivals.

📋 ROLES WE ARE CASTING:

👦 Boy — aged 4 to 7 (lead role)

👩 Woman — aged 25 to 33 (lead role)

👨 Man — aged 30 to 45 (lead role)

🎭 ABOUT THE PROJECT:

A short dramatic film — emotional, raw, and character-driven. A story about family, secrets, and discovery. We are obsessed with every detail of this project and that obsession will show on screen.

⭐ American accent preferred for all roles — but if you feel strongly about the project, reach out anyway.

📍 LOCATION: Staszów, Województwo Świętokrzyskie, Poland

🎥 SHOOT: 2 to 3 days total

💰 COMPENSATION: This is a passion project with no financial compensation. What we offer is a high-quality short film for your reel, full credit, and the chance to be part of something we truly believe will turn heads on the festival circuit. 

📩 Interested? Send me a direct message here on Facebook. I'd love to hear from you.

items.text:
Good evening folks;  

My name is Eric Apparito, I am an inspiring film lover with a passion for voice acting but also open to other  types of film work such as being a model for photoshoots or model posing, a camera operator, production assistant and even narration. Anyway I was wondering if there’s any chance I can get involved with future films/projects you guys are doing?!    Or perhaps would you guys be able to do a zoom meeting/interview or phone call with me to discuss further plans? Or if you guys have any job openings I can do like helping out on stage props or stage preparations for shows themselves.

Please and Thank you, I’d be more than willing to help out in any way I can and to further my career. I love to do photography work to, hope I’ll be given the chance.

-Eric Apparito

items.text:
Looking for 1 actor and 1 actress who’d be down to help me test out a new lens for an upcoming film.

Nothing too crazy — we’d just meet at a park and shoot a few cinematic scenes/moments to see how the lens looks. This is perfect for anyone who wants some film-style footage they might be able to use for their reel or socials.

Trying to give actors a chance to get footage that looks like it belongs in a real film, while I test the lens and build out some visuals.

If you’re interested, send me a headshot/photo and any reel or acting clips if you have them, best form of contact is IG: mateokbernard.

items.text:
📍 NOW CASTING – Detroit, Michigan
We’re looking for talented, passionate, and emotionally expressive actors to join the cast of COUCH TALK.

This is a character-driven urban drama centered on friendship, truth, betrayal, healing, and the difficult conversations that change lives.

We’re seeking actors who can bring authenticity, vulnerability, and powerful performances to the screen.

items.text:
🌟 فخامة الديكور العصري بين يديك | جملة ومفرق 🌟
​هل تبحث عن تحويل منزلك أو مكتبك إلى تحفة فنية بأحدث صيحات الديكور العالمي؟
Yuri Service تفتح لكم أبواب مستودعها الأكبر لتوفير أرقى تشكيلة من بدائل الخشب، الرخام، والحجر بأعلى جودة وأقوى الأسعار في السوق!
​نحن نجمع لك بين البيع بالجملة لأصحاب المشاريع والمحلات، والبيع بالمفرق للأفراد مع تشكيلة ألوان وموديلات (سعودي، تركي، سوري، وصيني) تلبي كل الأذواق.
​📐 تشكيلتنا ومنتجاتنا المتكاملة:
​بديل الرخام المميز: بمقاسات ملكية ضخمة 122 \times 280\text{ cm} ومقاسات متنوعة مثل 60 \times 60\text{ cm} تمنح المكان مظهراً متكاملاً بدون فواصل.
​بديل الخشب الفاخر: تشكيلة ألوان واسعة، بطول 280\text{ cm} وبعرض متنوع (12\text{cm}، 15\text{cm}، 20\text{cm}، و 60\text{cm}).
​بديل الحجر الحديث: بأشكال رائدة وألوان رملية وطبيعية ساحرة لعشاق التميز.
​إكسسوارات التشطيب والبراويز: تشكيلة ضخمة من البراويز، الزوايا العادية، وزوايا الإضاءة المخفية (لايت ستارت / Light Start) لداير السقف وداير الأرض، بالإضافة إلى المونتاجات الاحترافية المخصصة للتركيب السريع والمتين.
​🏪 تفضلوا بزيارتنا في المستودع!
​البضاعة متوفرة بكثرة وبخيارات لا تنتهي، ونفضل دائماً تشريفكم لنا في المحل/المستودع لتشاهدوا جودة الألوان والخامات على الطبيعة وتختاروا ما يناسبكم.
​📞 للطلب والاستفسار (واتساب أو اتصال مباشر):

items.summary:
🌟 فخامة الديكور العصري بين يديك | جملة ومفرق 🌟
​هل تبحث عن تحويل منزلك أو مكتبك إلى تحفة فنية بأحدث صيحات الديكور العالمي؟
Yuri Service تفتح لكم أبواب مستودعها الأكبر لتوفير أرقى تشكيلة من بدائل الخشب، الرخام، والحجر بأعلى جودة وأقوى الأسعار في السوق!
​نحن نجمع لك بين البيع بالجملة لأصحاب المشاريع والمحلات، والبيع بالمفرق للأفراد مع تشكيلة ألوان وموديلات (سعودي، تركي، سوري، وصيني) تلبي كل الأذواق.
​📐 تشكيلتنا ومنتجاتنا المتكاملة:
​بديل الرخام المميز: بمقاسات ملكية ضخمة 122 \times 280\text{ cm} ومقاسات متنوعة مثل 60 \times 60\text{ cm} تمنح المكان مظهراً متكاملاً بدون فواصل.
​بديل الخشب الفاخر: تشكيلة ألوان واسعة، بطول 280\text{ cm} وبعرض متنوع (12\text{cm}، 15\text{cm}، 20\text{cm}، و 60\text{cm}).
​بديل الحجر الحديث: بأشكال رائدة وألوان رملية وطبيعية ساحرة لعشاق التميز.
​إكسسوارات التشطيب والبراويز: تشكيلة ضخمة من البراويز، الزوايا العادية، وزوايا الإضاءة المخفية (لايت ستارت / Light Start) لداير السقف وداير الأرض، بالإضافة إلى المونتاجات الاحترافية المخصصة للتركيب السريع والمتين.
​🏪 تفضلوا بزيارتنا في المستودع!
​البضاعة متوفرة بكثرة وبخيارات لا تنتهي، ونفضل دائماً تشريفكم لنا في المحل/المستودع لتشاهدوا جودة الألوان والخامات على الطبيعة وتختاروا ما يناسبكم.
​📞 للطلب والاستفسار (واتساب أو اتصال مباشر):
​📱 01621660582
📍 Gelsenkirchen, Germany
​#Wandpaneele #AcousticPanels #بديل_الخشب #بديل_الرخام #بديل_الحجر #ديكورات_داخلية #تشطيبات #تجديد_منازل #ديكور_مودرن #لايت_ستارت #Wandverkleidung #Heimwerken #Interiordesign #MarmorOptik #Holzoptik #Gelsenkirchen #NordrheinWestfalen #

🎭 ONLINE ACTING COURSE – JULY 2026 🎭

For young people ages 8 - 13 years looking to build confidence, develop acting skills and have fun all from the comfort home!

**4-Week Online Acting Course** starting **Monday 6th July**!

📅 Dates:
• Monday 6th July
• Monday 13th July
• Monday 20th July
• Monday 27th July

🕖 Evening sessions are 90 minutes (online)

Throughout the course students will explore:
✨ Character development
✨ Script analysis
✨ Objectives and emotional journey
✨ Screen performance techniques
✨ Confidence and creativity

Perfect for young performers looking to develop their acting skills in a supportive and engaging environment.

💷 £40 for the full 4-week course

Spaces are limited, so book now to secure your place!

items.text:
With a month to go, join us on THE residential summer course for stage and screen combat!

Whether you're a newcomer needing your skills for period drama or panto, or a fight performers wanting specific skills as you do live events or SPACT work, this one has something for you.

A week learning the skills and choreography in three weapons, qualifying with an exam underwritten by ACTT Stage Combat, one of the 5 examination bodies recognised by Equity and Spotlight.

All bed and board covered, three meals a day, an free evening workshops in supporting skills too - rigging, martial arts, and more!

https://www.swordandscoundrel.co.uk/event-details/the-summer-course 

Book here!

Hey everyone! 
I'm currently developing a true story, low-budget psychological thriller feature and am looking for an actress (playing age around 20) to take on the lead role.

❗️ I'm really only looking to hear from actresses who also want to get involved on the producing side in some capacity❗️

She’s a fantastic, very complex character with a lot to sink your teeth into. 

If you’re interested, or you'd just like to connect, email me at boundsfilms@gmail.com
Looking forward to connecting!!

sharedPost.text:
Hello everyone,

I’m excited to announce that I’m doing picture auditions for a KFC TV advert and I’m looking for everyday people to be part of it!  

Body Type & Look  

- A variety of body sizes and styles (note: the client isn’t considering larger frames for this particular project).  
- Unique features are celebrated — things like birthmarks, gapped teeth, or anything that makes you stand out.  
- Most importantly, I want real, relatable faces that feel like everyday South Africans.  

Applicants should be based in or around Johannesburg.  

If you’re confident, not camera shy, and have features that make you uniquely you, please send your recent studio pictures to my WhatsApp: 078 121 4807.  

@highlight

CASTING VOICE ACTOR

Title: Spilled Milk

Genre: Reality

Logline: In the heart of Denver’s nightlife, Spilled Milk follows a circle of bartenders, DJ’s, influencers, and club insiders whose friendships, romances, and rivalries collide both on and off the dance floor.
 
Role:
NARRATOR (male or female) Provides voiceover narration for the opening sequences and potentially future episodes.

Production Type: Reality TV Pilot

Contact Information: luke@lostefilms.com

Run Time: Approx. 25 minutes

Compensation: Paid

Union Status: Non-Union

Audition Information: Send email with voiceover samples, we will send additional details and a brief audition script to those we want to hear more from.

Read more about the project here:

items.text: It’s been an increasingly busy summer so far! So we are currently still casting Huntrix and Princess character performers in Colorado Springs, Denver, and their surrounding areas! More details below 👑✨

sharedPost.text:
✨ CASTING CALL ✨
📍 Colorado Springs, Denver & surrounding areas

Due to an overwhelming increase in bookings — including frequent double and triple bookings — Once Upon A Dream is currently looking to expand our dream team of professional character performers!

As our cast continues to grow, we are actively working toward expanding authentic and diverse representation within these roles and are especially seeking performers of color for our Huntrix casting needs. Performers of Asian descent especially are strongly encouraged to apply!

Roles Needed: Rumi, Mira, Zoey, and all Saja boys.

What We’re Looking For:

✨ Comfortable performing in character and interacting with kids
✨ Great with children (experience with special needs children is a HUGE bonus!)
✨Acting skills (singing is a plus, but not required)
✨Flexible weekend availability
✨Reliable, enthusiastic, and passionate about creating magical memories

No professional training required — just heart, commitment, and a love for bringing stories to life. Training and costumes will be provided. 

💌 Interested in joining the magic?

• DM us via any of our social media platforms
• Text (719) 246-7591, or
• Email onceuponadream.co@outlook.com

items.text:
**Statist søges til videooptagelse den 29/6 tæt ved Roskilde station**

 

**Tid:** ca. 3 timer – nærmere tidspunkt kommer senere

**Løn:** ulønnet, men du får et gavekort til 2x biograf billetter

 

👷‍♀️ **1 ung pige på ca 14 (i dit eget tøj)**

 

 

Skriv gerne til mig, hvis det er noget for dig, eller hvis du kender en, der kunne passe. På caba@detsocialenetvaerk.dk

 

 

Videoptagelsen skal bruges til at lave et online kursus for headspace Danmark, der skal inspirere til samtale.
